old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-gq6l","title":"lichen-sim: MAX_MSG_LEN too small for protocol max payload","description":"file: rust/lichen-sim/src/client.rs:33

MAX_MSG_LEN is set to 64KB (65536 bytes) but the protocol allows payloads up to 65535 bytes. An RX_OK message with maximum payload would be:
- 1 byte (type) + 2 bytes (len) + 65535 bytes (payload) + 2 bytes (rssi) + 2 bytes (snr) = 65542 bytes

This exceeds MAX_MSG_LEN, so recv_msg() would reject a legitimate max-sized message with 'message too large' error.

Impact: Low - LoRa payloads are typically <255 bytes in practice. This only affects simulator testing with artificially large payloads.

Fix: Increase MAX_MSG_LEN to at least 65550 (to accommodate RX_OK with max payload plus some margin).","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:18:29.053535Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T17:18:29.053585Z"}

new_value: MAX_MSG_LEN increased to 128KiB to cover max RX_OK (65542B). cargo check + clippy clean. Full fix, security bound preserved. No oracle or deadcode.
